featured.title: Restaurant Review Analytics & Strategy
featured.desc: Designed a full data pipeline in KNIME to parse JSON-format Yelp review data from MongoDB Atlas. Applied transformation techniques to identify key factors affecting customer satisfaction and developed visual dashboards to propose data-driven location strategies for new restaurants.

featured.title: COVID-19 Socio-Economic Impact Analysis
featured.desc: Analyzed correlations between COVID-19 case data and economic indicators (GDP, HDI) using Kaggle datasets. Implemented multiple ML models including Lasso Regression and Decision Trees to predict case trends across countries.

featured.title: Employee Check-in Web Application
featured.desc: Built a web-based employee check-in system using Python and Flask for EarthX factory operations. Streamlined daily attendance tracking and integrated with existing operational workflows.

featured.title: RAG Portfolio Chatbot
featured.desc: An AI-powered assistant that lives on this website, capable of answering questions about my background, projects, and skills using Retrieval-Augmented Generation.

featured.title: Disney Licensed Business CRM
featured.desc: Full-stack CRM for a family company's Disney licensing operations — managing 30+ customers, a 7-stage project pipeline (lead → sampling → production → live), contracts with expiry alerts, and follow-up timelines. Built 9 pages with Kanban/list dual views, role-based access (4 roles), PDF upload to COS, Excel export, and a dual-mode API layer that switches between local mock data and Tencent CloudBase REST backend via env variable.

featured.title: Slay the Spire 2 AI Agent
featured.desc: A 1,700-line Python agent that plays Slay the Spire 2 autonomously using local LLMs. Runs an observe→think→act loop across 13 game states, routing only 1–3 relevant tools per state to keep small models focused. Features pre-computed combat math (damage/block/kill thresholds), energy guards, parser fallback for unstructured LLM output, and loop detection. Achieved 91% action success rate and beat the Act 1 boss with Qwen3.5-27B on an RTX 4090.

featured.title: K8s ML Inference + Observability Stack
featured.desc: A FastAPI inference service on Kubernetes with custom Prometheus metrics (Counter + Histogram), automatic service discovery via ServiceMonitor CRD, and Grafana dashboards tracking RPS, P99 latency, and per-pod memory. Includes a 3-namespace microservices networking exercise with cross-namespace DNS, and resilience testing through pod deletion, full outage simulation, and 500-request load tests — all in 261 lines of code on Minikube.

archive.title: Airport Shortest Routes Finder
archive.desc: CS225 team final project. Built a graph-based system using OpenFlights data to find shortest routes between airports and rank the 10 most important airports globally.

archive.title: Game Level Design — Infinite Matrix
archive.desc: Course MPs exploring game level design concepts and infinite matrix implementations in C++.
